svg.title: C++ Systems Project Learning Roadmap
svg.desc: A phased learning roadmap for building a C++ task and event processing engine
svg.text: From zero to building Redis + Celery + Kafka-inspired engine in C++
Total estimated: 7–11 weeks of consistent work
1–2 hrs/day is enough if you code while you learn
Critical rule: always run with -fsanitize=thread from day 1
Concurrency bugs are invisible until they aren't. Don't debug blindly.
